creator: edwin@mavetju.org
text:
It has been the trend to remove pkg-plists and use PLIST_FILES for
small pkg-plists, say up to 5 files. Portlint could give a warning
when the size of the pkg-plist is say up to 5 files, when there are
no "funny" characters in the pkg-plist (@something, %%something%%
etc)
